search.tryHint: Try constituency, representative, or party name.
search.scopeNoticePolitician: Showing constituencies whose representative matches your search. This database is building toward individual representative profiles — each result links to that representative's full evidence record.
search.scopeNoticeParty: Showing constituencies associated with this party. Party-level aggregated records are being built as part of this shared public knowledge base.

home.datasetBrowserBody: Search across constituencies, representatives, and parties. Open a record to review evidence, confidence, freshness, and verification date.

constituency.noIdHelp: Search for a constituency from the home page to view its representative's record and evidence.

evidenceDrawer.noSources: No sources have been linked to this promise yet. You can help by submitting evidence using the Report correction button.

correction.title: Submit a correction
correction.helper: Share what should be corrected. Add supporting source if available.
correction.name: Name
correction.failure: Could not submit now. Please try again.

disclaimer.neutrality: This page presents source-linked records only. It does not endorse any party or candidate.
disclaimer.verification: If data is missing or outdated, use Report correction with supporting evidence.

submissionForm.emailHelper: For follow-up if needed. Not shared publicly.
submissionForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what should be corrected and why...
submissionForm.descriptionHint: Clearly state what information is incorrect and what the correct data should be.
submissionForm.sourceUrlHint: Link to official document, news article, or other verifiable source.

submissionToast.successBody: Thank you, your submission is under review.
submissionToast.errorBody: Network error. Your draft has been saved. Try again.

submissionTracker.title: Your submissions
submissionTracker.subtitle: Track the status of corrections and evidence you have submitted.
submissionTracker.tapHint: Tap a submission to view full details and timeline.

evidenceFlow.evidenceHelper: Share supporting evidence for this promise.
